ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Alert Dialog provides modal confirmation composition with cancel and action parts.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora validates least-destructive focus, forbids implicit dismissal, and optionally gates destructive completion behind a native controlled or uncontrolled acknowledgement.

visualSignature.summary: The alert surface inherits the literal Canvas dialog workbench, Ink boundary, shared Violet focus seam, restrained warning rail, strong labels, bounded corners, and preference-safe overlay motion.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A labelled native checkbox can hold every destructive action until acknowledgement while supporting controlled and uncontrolled state.

api.enableWhen: Provide acknowledgementLabel and optionally control acknowledged state.

disabledBehavior.ui: No acknowledgement rail or checkbox is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The destructive action retains its normal enabled state.
disabledBehavior.events: No acknowledgement change handler is installed or invoked.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No checkbox, acknowledgement description, or action description contribution is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated role, focus, keyboard, pointer, narrow layout, RTL, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and axe evidence is current; manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Explicit dismissal, least-destructive focus, acknowledgement gating, action completion, and disabled enhancement removal are browser-covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Risk Class 2 manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and relevant device evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Dialog provides modal trigger, portal, overlay, content, title, description, and close composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora adds explicit dismissal policies, reasoned state changes, resilient workflow-successor focus restoration, and an optional announced dismissal-discovery rail.

visualSignature.summary: The overlay uses a literal Canvas surface, Ink boundary, deliberate heading hierarchy, shared Violet focus seam, measured workbench spacing, bounded corners, and spatial motion with reduced-motion removal.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Consumer-supplied dismissal guidance is visible and appended to the dialog description without changing dismissal mechanics.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Dismissal follows dismissPolicy without added behavior.
disabledBehavior.events: No discovery-specific event handler is installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No hint ID or aria-describedby contribution is emitted.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Popover provides anchored trigger, content, collision handling, and dismissal composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps explicit non-modal ownership, maps logical placement independently from locale, records open-change reasons, and optionally adds announced anchor context and managed entry focus.

visualSignature.summary: The anchored surface uses literal Canvas, Ink structure, strong title and context hierarchy, shared Violet focus, a measured context rail, restrained corners, and collision-aware motion with reduced-motion removal.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A persistent context rail keeps the anchor's meaning available when collision or scrolling moves the trigger away.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Positioning, collision, and dismissal are unchanged.
disabledBehavior.events: No context-specific event handler is installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No context ID or aria-describedby contribution is emitted.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Task popovers can deliberately focus the content or first interactive target while the basic default keeps focus on the trigger.

api.enableWhen: Set initialFocus to content or first-interactive, optionally with initialFocusRef.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Opening leaves focus on the trigger under initialFocus none.
disabledBehavior.events: No entry-focus effect moves focus into the surface.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No extra focus announcement is caused by entry movement.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Disabled-looking controls can remain keyboard discoverable for supplemental explanation while all activation is suppressed.

disabledBehavior.ui: The ordinary trigger is rendered without disabled-adapter styling.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The trigger keeps normal activation behavior.
disabledBehavior.events: No adapter click cancellation or propagation stop is installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No aria-disabled state or adapter slot is exposed.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Tooltip content can append concise keyboard context without making the tooltip interactive.
